# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

// main.ts - Deno Deploy Plugin System with Dynamic Module Loading

const ALLOWED_MODULES_PREFIX = [
  "https://deno.land/",
  "https://esm.sh/",
  "jsr:",
];

const MAX_MODULE_PATH_LENGTH = 512;

const MODULE_PATH_PATTERN = /^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.\/\:@\+\~]+$/;

function getConfiguredModules(): string[] {
  const modulesEnv = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES") || "";
  if (!modulesEnv.trim()) return [];
  return modulesEnv.split(",").map((m) => m.trim()).filter((m) => m.length > 0);
}

function validateModulePath(modulePath: string): { valid: boolean; reason?: string } {
  if (!modulePath || typeof modulePath !== "string") {
    return { valid: false, reason: "Module path must be a non-empty string" };
  }

  if (modulePath.length > MAX_MODULE_PATH_LENGTH) {
    return { valid: false, reason: `Module path exceeds maximum length of ${MAX_MODULE_PATH_LENGTH}` };
  }

  if (!MODULE_PATH_PATTERN.test(modulePath)) {
    return { valid: false, reason: "Module path contains invalid characters" };
  }

  // Prevent path traversal
  if (modulePath.includes("..") || modulePath.includes("./")) {
    return { valid: false, reason: "Path traversal sequences are not allowed" };
  }

  // Prevent file:// protocol and local file access
  if (modulePath.startsWith("file:") || modulePath.startsWith("/") || modulePath.startsWith("\\")) {
    return { valid: false, reason: "Local file access is not allowed" };
  }

  // Prevent data: and blob: URIs
  if (modulePath.startsWith("data:") || modulePath.startsWith("blob:")) {
    return { valid: false, reason: "Data and blob URIs are not allowed" };
  }

  // Must match one of the allowed prefixes
  const isAllowed = ALLOWED_MODULES_PREFIX.some((prefix) => modulePath.startsWith(prefix));
  if (!isAllowed) {
    return {
      valid: false,
      reason: `Module path must start with one of: ${ALLOWED_MODULES_PREFIX.join(", ")}`,
    };
  }

  return { valid: true };
}

interface PluginModule {
  name?: string;
  version?: string;
  init?: () => Promise<void> | void;
  handle?: (request: Request) => Promise<Response> | Response;
  transform?: (data: unknown) => Promise<unknown> | unknown;
}

interface LoadedPlugin {
  path: string;
  module: PluginModule;
  loadedAt: string;
}

const loadedPlugins: Map<string, LoadedPlugin> = new Map();

async function loadModule(modulePath: string): Promise<PluginModule> {
  const validation = validateModulePath(modulePath);
  if (!validation.valid) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid module path "${modulePath}": ${validation.reason}`);
  }

  // Check cache
  if (loadedPlugins.has(modulePath)) {
    return loadedPlugins.get(modulePath)!.module;
  }

  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath) as PluginModule;

    // Validate that the module exports expected interface
    if (module && typeof module === "object") {
      const plugin: LoadedPlugin = {
        path: modulePath,
        module,
        loadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };
      loadedPlugins.set(modulePath, plugin);

      // Call init if available
      if (typeof module.init === "function") {
        await module.init();
      }

      return module;
    } else {
      throw new Error("Module did not export a valid object");
    }
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
    throw new Error(`Failed to load module "${modulePath}": ${message}`);
  }
}

async function initConfiguredPlugins(): Promise<void> {
  const configuredModules = getConfiguredModules();
  for (const modulePath of configuredModules) {
    try {
      await loadModule(modulePath);
      console.log(`Successfully loaded configured plugin: ${modulePath}`);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Failed to load configured plugin: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : error}`);
    }
  }
}

function jsonResponse(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",
      "X-Frame-Options": "DENY",
      "Content-Security-Policy": "default-src 'none'",
    },
  });
}

// Rate limiting (simple in-memory, per-IP)
const rateLimitMap: Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }> = new Map();
const RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60_000;
const RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS = 30;

function checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {
  const now = Date.now();
  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);

  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {
    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetAt: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });
    return true;
  }

  if (entry.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS) {
    return false;
  }

  entry.count++;
  return true;
}

// Clean up stale rate limit entries periodically
setInterval(() => {
  const now = Date.now();
  for (const [ip, entry] of rateLimitMap) {
    if (now > entry.resetAt) {
      rateLimitMap.delete(ip);
    }
  }
}, 60_000);

// Initialize configured plugins on startup
await initConfiguredPlugins();

Deno.serve({ port: 8000 }, async (request: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const clientIp = request.headers.get("x-forwarded-for")?.split(",")[0]?.trim() || "unknown";

  if (!checkRateLimit(clientIp)) {
    return jsonResponse({ error: "Rate limit exceeded. Try again later." }, 429);
  }

  try {
    // GET /plugins - List loaded plugins
    if (url.pathname === "/plugins" && request.method === "GET") {
      const plugins = Array.from(loadedPlugins.entries()).map(([path, plugin]) => ({
        path,
        name: plugin.module.name || "unnamed",
        version: plugin.module.version || "unknown",
        loadedAt: plugin.loadedAt,
        hasHandler: typeof plugin.module.handle === "function",
        hasTransform: typeof plugin.module.transform === "function",
      }));
      return jsonResponse({ plugins });
    }

    // POST /plugins/load - Load a new plugin
    if (url.pathname === "/plugins/load" && request.method === "POST") {
      // Check for API key authentication
      const apiKey = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_API_KEY");
      if (apiKey) {
        const providedKey = request.headers.get("Authorization")?.replace("Bearer ", "");
        if (providedKey !== apiKey) {
          return jsonResponse({ error: "Unauthorized" }, 401);
        }
      }

      const contentType = request.headers.get("content-type") || "";
      if (!contentType.includes("application/json")) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Content-Type must be application/json" }, 415);
      }

      let body: { module?: string };
      try {
        const text = await request.text();
        if (text.length > 1024) {
          return jsonResponse({ error: "Request body too large" }, 413);
        }
        body = JSON.parse(text);
      } catch {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Invalid JSON body" }, 400);
      }

      const modulePath = body.module;
      if (!modulePath || typeof modulePath !== "string") {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Missing 'module' field in request body" }, 400);
      }

      const validation = validateModulePath(modulePath);
      if (!validation.valid) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: validation.reason }, 400);
      }

      try {
        const loadedModule = await loadModule(modulePath);
        return jsonResponse({
          success: true,
          plugin: {
            path: modulePath,
            name: loadedModule.name || "unnamed",
            version: loadedModule.version || "unknown",
          },
        });
      } catch (error) {
        return jsonResponse({
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to load module",
        }, 400);
      }
    }

    // POST /plugins/load?module=<path> - Load via query parameter
    if (url.pathname === "/plugins/load" && request.method === "GET") {
      const apiKey = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_API_KEY");
      if (apiKey) {
        const providedKey = request.headers.get("Authorization")?.replace("Bearer ", "");
        if (providedKey !== apiKey) {
          return jsonResponse({ error: "Unauthorized" }, 401);
        }
      }

      const modulePath = url.searchParams.get("module");
      if (!modulePath) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Missing 'module' query parameter" }, 400);
      }

      const validation = validateModulePath(modulePath);
      if (!validation.valid) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: validation.reason }, 400);
      }

      try {
        const loadedModule = await loadModule(modulePath);
        return jsonResponse({
          success: true,
          plugin: {
            path: modulePath,
            name: loadedModule.name || "unnamed",
            version: loadedModule.version || "unknown",
          },
        });
      } catch (error) {
        return jsonResponse({
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to load module",
        }, 400);
      }
    }

    // DELETE /plugins/unload - Unload a plugin
    if (url.pathname === "/plugins/unload" && request.method === "POST") {
      const apiKey = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_API_KEY");
      if (apiKey) {
        const providedKey = request.headers.get("Authorization")?.replace("Bearer ", "");
        if (providedKey !== apiKey) {
          return jsonResponse({ error: "Unauthorized" }, 401);
        }
      }

      const contentType = request.headers.get("content-type") || "";
      if (!contentType.includes("application/json")) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Content-Type must be application/json" }, 415);
      }

      let body: { module?: string };
      try {
        const text = await request.text();
        if (text.length > 1024) {
          return jsonResponse({ error: "Request body too large" }, 413);
        }
        body = JSON.parse(text);
      } catch {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Invalid JSON body" }, 400);
      }

      const modulePath = body.module;
      if (!modulePath || typeof modulePath !== "string") {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Missing 'module' field" }, 400);
      }

      if (loadedPlugins.has(modulePath)) {
        loadedPlugins.delete(modulePath);
        return jsonResponse({ success: true, message: `Plugin ${modulePath} unloaded` });
      } else {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Plugin not found" }, 404);
      }
    }

    // GET /plugins/execute/:pluginName - Execute a plugin's handle function
    if (url.pathname.startsWith("/plugins/execute/") && request.method === "GET") {
      const pluginPath = decodeURIComponent(url.pathname.replace("/plugins/execute/", ""));

      const plugin = loadedPlugins.get(pluginPath);
      if (!plugin) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Plugin not found" }, 404);
      }

      if (typeof plugin.module.handle !== "function") {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Plugin does not have a handle function" }, 400);
      }

      try {
        const result = await Promise.race([
          plugin.module.handle(request),
          new Promise<never>((_, reject) =>
            setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("Plugin execution timed out")), 5000)
          ),
        ]);
        return result;
      } catch (error) {
        return jsonResponse({
          error: `Plugin execution failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
        }, 500);
      }
    }

    // POST /plugins/transform/:pluginPath - Execute a plugin's transform function
    if (url.pathname.startsWith("/plugins/transform/") && request.method === "POST") {
      const pluginPath = decodeURIComponent(url.pathname.replace("/plugins/transform/", ""));

      const plugin = loadedPlugins.get(pluginPath);
      if (!plugin) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Plugin not found" }, 404);
      }

      if (typeof plugin.module.transform !== "function") {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Plugin does not have a transform function" }, 400);
      }

      const contentType = request.headers.get("content-type") || "";
      if (!contentType.includes("application/json")) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Content-Type must be application/json" }, 415);
      }

      let inputData: unknown;
      try {
        const text = await request.text();
        if (text.length > 10240) {
          return jsonResponse({ error: "Request body too large" }, 413);
        }
        inputData = JSON.parse(text);
      } catch {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Invalid JSON body" }, 400);
      }

      try {
        const result = await Promise.race([
          plugin.module.transform(inputData),
          new Promise<never>((_, reject) =>
            setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("Plugin transform timed out")), 5000)
          ),
        ]);
        return jsonResponse({ result });
      } catch (error) {
        return jsonResponse({
          error: `Plugin transform failed: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
        }, 500);
      }
    }

    // GET /health - Health check
    if (url.pathname === "/health") {
      return jsonResponse({
        status: "ok",
        pluginsLoaded: loadedPlugins.size,
        allowedPrefixes: ALLOWED_MODULES_PREFIX,
      });
    }

    // GET / - API info
    if (url.pathname === "/") {
      return jsonResponse({
        name: "Deno Deploy Plugin System",
        version: "1.0.0",
        endpoints: {
          "GET /health": "Health check",
          "GET /plugins": "List loaded plugins",
          "POST /plugins/load": "Load a plugin (body: { module: string })",
          "GET /plugins/load?module=<path>": "Load a plugin via query parameter",
          "POST /plugins/unload": "Unload a plugin (body: { module: string })",
          "GET /plugins/execute/<encodedPath>": "Execute a plugin's handle function",
          "POST /plugins/transform/<encodedPath>": "Execute a plugin's transform function",
        },
        allowedModulePrefixes: ALLOWED_MODULES_PREFIX,
      });
    }

    return jsonResponse({ error: "Not found" }, 404);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Unhandled error:", error);
    return jsonResponse({ error: "Internal server error" }, 500);
  }
});
